// About Me

Chasing results, not just looks

I'm a Junior Media Buyer with hands-on experience managing and optimizing Meta advertising campaigns for brands like Alma, Ãram, and Abo El Eila. My work focuses on campaign setup, precise audience targeting, performance analysis, and improving ROAS through data-driven decisions.

I'm committed to continuously growing in Media Buying and Performance Marketing — every campaign is a chance to learn something new I can apply to the next one.
